---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Kintora
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

> 💡 Reminder: Kintora is **100% offline** by design. Features must not add cloud
> services, accounts, telemetry, or anything that sends data over the network.
> Any AI must run locally.

**What problem does this solve?**
The need or frustration behind the idea.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about.

**Does it keep Kintora fully offline?**
Yes / No — and how.
